description_long: This is a stylized deciduous tree with a thick, dark brown trunk supporting a lush, rounded canopy of green foliage. The canopy is composed of several overlapping clusters of broad, simple leaves, giving the tree a full and healthy appearance. The leaves are painted in varying shades of green, with lighter highlights and darker shadows to suggest depth and volume. The trunk is relatively short and stout, tapering slightly as it meets the leafy crown. No roots are visible above the ground, and the tree's branches are mostly obscured by the dense foliage. This type of tree is commonly found in urban parks, along sidewalks, or in residential neighborhoods, providing shade and aesthetic value.
description: A stylized, broadleaf tree with a dense, rounded green canopy and a thick, dark brown trunk. The foliage is lush and layered, typical of urban park or street trees.
description_view_0: The tree is seen from a slightly angled side, showing the thick trunk and the overlapping, rounded clusters of green leaves.
description_view_1: This view highlights the front of the tree, with the trunk centered and the dense, leafy canopy spreading symmetrically above.
description_view_2: The tree is viewed from another side, revealing the layered foliage and the trunk partially obscured by the leaves.
description_view_3: The back of the tree is visible, with the trunk slightly angled and the canopy appearing more open on the right side.
